title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: A decade-long retrospective on AlphaGo's 2016 victory over Lee Sedol in Go, presented by Google DeepMind leaders Pushmeet Kohli and Thore Graepel. The video frames AlphaGo's match as the catalyst for the modern AI revolution, connecting it to subsequent advances in algorithmic discovery and scientific breakthroughs like protein folding.
